name: GNSSMakeName
title: GNSSMakeName
syntax: void GNSSMakeName( word deviceName[8], dword selfConfigurable, dword industryGroup, dword deviceClassInstance, dword deviceClass, dword function, dword functionInstance, dword ECUInstance, dword manufacturerCode, dword identityNumber);
description: The function generates a J1939 device name. It must be transferred with a byte array of size 8. This array is filled with the device name.

parameters.name: deviceName
parameters.description: Name of the device (determines the function)
